subcodes.first_line: O ye two birds of the meadow of mystic knowledge! The season of Dey and Bahman hath passed away, and the soul-nurturing springtime hath come unto the fields and plains [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مرغ چمن عرفان موسم دی و بهمن بگذشت فصل بهار جانپرور رسید دشت و صحرا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds
